_note: 3D models (Hunyuan3D in ComfyUI). gen_models.py makes a clean reference image via the edit pipeline, then image->3D through your exported hunyuan3d_workflow.json, saving public/models/<name>.glb. The game auto-loads these (kart_standard/sport/heavy for the 3 bodies; props by name) with procedural fallback.
ref_style: single game asset, 3/4 three-quarter view, centered, plain flat white background, full object visible, clean, no ground, no shadow, chibi cartoon, bold outline

models.name: kart_standard
